title: Sankalp Shikshan Sansthan Jashpur Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
short_info: Sankalp Shikshan Sansthan Jashpur Faculty Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Sankalp Shikshan Sansthan Jashpur. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the Sankalp Shikshan Sansthan Jashpur Faculty Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc./M.Tech. in respective subject, Minimum two years of teaching experience in JEE/NEET preparation from reputed Coaching Institutes, Preference to Ph.D. or alumni of IITs/NITs
qualification.details: Biology Faculty: M.Sc./M.Tech. in Biology with minimum two years of teaching experience in JEE/NEET preparation from reputed Coaching Institutes. Preference to Ph.D. or IITs/NITs alumni. Mathematics Faculty: M.Sc./M.Tech. in Mathematics with minimum two years of teaching experience in JEE/NEET preparation from reputed Coaching Institutes. Preference to Ph.D. or IITs/NITs alumni. Physics Faculty: M.Sc./M.Tech. in Physics with minimum two years of teaching experience in JEE/NEET preparation from reputed Coaching Institutes. Preference to Ph.D. or IITs/NITs alumni. Chemistry Faculty: M.Sc./M.Tech. in Chemistry with minimum two years of teaching experience in JEE/NEET preparation from reputed Coaching Institutes. Preference to Ph.D. or IITs/NITs alumni.
